effect.lne_rogues.second_wind.descriptio: When applied, gain 20% of your max health as absorption. You can recover 10-35% of your missing health every 2 seconds.
spell.lne_rogues.dancing_dagger.descript: Throw a dagger that ricochets between enemies, dealing {damage} damage and applying grievous wounds for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.lne_rogues.dancing_dagger.name: Dancing Dagger
spell.lne_rogues.second_wind.description: Recover your breath and gain a temporary boost based on your max health for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.lne_rogues.second_wind.name: Second Wind
